info.description: Machine-authoritative /v1/admin surface for the Waterfall Management Dashboard (docs/waterfall-dashboard/04-api-contracts.md). Path set is kept at parity with the mounted mux routes by internal/dash/apispec/parity_test.go. Schemas are intentionally shallow; completeness of PATHS is the contract this artifact pins.
info.title: Waterfall Dashboard Admin API

post.summary: Set the first password from a one-time invite token (public; token is the credential)

get.summary: Current user, role, tenant, session expiry

post.summary: Complete login with TOTP or recovery code

get.summary: Get a CRM connection by id (Tenant-scoped, ADR-0030)
List the LLM model cascade catalog (operator-only, ADR-0026)
Get an assembled Dossier by id (Tenant-scoped, ADR-0028)
List accounts with computed intent (Tenant-scoped, ADR-0027)
Per-class computed intent for an account (Tenant-scoped, ADR-0027)

post.summary: Request cooperative cancellation of an in-flight bulk job (OI-API-4)

get.summary: Current epoch per kind for cache validation
NDJSON stream of the summary query
Cost per filled field per provider per workflow

post.summary: Bulk op by ids or filter
Sync provider-reported balance for this key
Create successor key with overlap window

get.summary: Side-by-side declared vs measured per field

post.summary: Run fixed sample through the real adapter
Clone catalog row as new draft
Smoke-test descriptor via a leased key

get.summary: Queue list with per-state count vector

put.summary: Desired worker count intent for a queue

get.summary: List routing scopes + active version + epoch

patch.summary: Set the Tenant's require_mfa knob (tenant_admin, step-up; SEC-5)

post.summary: Provision a customer Tenant + first tenant_admin invite (operator-only, step-up; ADR-0021)

get.summary: List workflows scopes + active version + epoch
